expectations.evidence: Reads then edits ~/scripts/ecosystem.env to add credentials
Sets both PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN, plus NOTIFY_ENABLED
Uses 'test-user-key' and 'test-app-token' as provided by user

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Writes to ecosystem.env (not committed to git) and does not echo credentials to stdout
